name: Almond Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the diced chicken, mayonnaise, yogurt, soup, broth, pepper, salt, lemon juice, onion, rice, sliced water chestnuts, 1 cup almonds, and celery together.
2. Transfer the mixture to a large buttered casserole dish.
3. Mix the remaining 1/2 cup almonds, butter, and corn flakes together.
4. Top the casserole with the almond-butter-corn flake mixture.
5. Bake in a pre-heated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-45 minutes.
6. Serves 4-6. This dish can be prepared ahead of time and stored in the refrigerator or freezer.
